text.title: JPA / Hibernate Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the JPA / Hibernate methodology end-to-end.

step.name: model-entity
step.input: Domain aggregate definition, business key field
step.action: Create entity class with `@Entity` + `@Table`. Declare all associations as `FetchType.LAZY`. Implement `equals`/`hashCode` over the business key. Use `@Getter @Setter`, never `@Data`.
step.decision-gate: If any association is `EAGER`, BLOCK per `lazy-by-default` rule.

step.name: ship-paired-migration
step.action: For every entity diff, author a Flyway migration `V<n>__<name>.sql` in the same PR. Apply expand-contract for any rename/type change. Set `spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=validate` in `application-prod.yml`.
step.output: Paired migration on disk + validate mode active
step.decision-gate: If migration is missing, BLOCK per `flyway-migration-per-entity-change` rule.

step.name: add-repository-with-bulk-safety
step.action: Define Spring Data JPA `JpaRepository`. For bulk updates/deletes, annotate `@Modifying(clearAutomatically = true, flushAutomatically = true)`. Use `@Query("... JOIN FETCH ...")` or `@EntityGraph` for opt-in eager loading.
step.output: Repository interface with safe bulk ops

step.name: add-service-with-dto-projection
step.action: Implement `@Service` methods that fetch entities and map to DTOs inside a `@Transactional` boundary. Controllers consume the DTO; entities MUST NOT cross the controller boundary.
step.decision-gate: If controller returns an entity, BLOCK per `dto-projection-in-controllers` rule.

step.name: add-datajpatest-slice
step.action: Author `@DataJpaTest` with Testcontainers (`@Container static PostgreSQLContainer ...`). Disable OSIV (`spring.jpa.open-in-view=false`) in all profiles.
step.output: Repository slice tests green + OSIV off
step.decision-gate: If repository test uses `@SpringBootTest`, fail per `datajpatest-for-repositories` rule.
